repair_memory_selection.selection_rationale: All five selected memories address the same class of build failure: redefinition of the operator class in autogen/op_proto.h due to a duplicate REG_OP or conflicting registration. The current error for ca6k_00360 is exactly that: `redefinition of ‘class ge::op::Ca6k00360Custom’` at op_proto.h:27 caused by REG_OP. These memories provide direct guidance to avoid adding a second operator definition (e.g., via OpDef or manual REG_OP) when autogen already supplies one. The op numbers differ, but the pattern is identical, making them highly relevant.
